title: Author pecan_lsp architecture specification (historical)
body:
Added **pecan_lsp** as a workspace member with an **architecture specification**: in-process language services, interop migration notes, and how JIT execution docs relate to editor features.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `pekan`
- **Commit:** [`29e1e80`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/pekan/commit/29e1e80)
- **Subject:** Add pecan_lsp workspace member with LSP architecture spec, interop migration plan, and JIT execution documentation updates
- **Completed:** 2026-02-26

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.0 (Pecan prototype)
- **Workstream:** `editor-lsp`
- **Deliverable:** `v00-tooling-research`

## Relation
Documented the **historical** LSP shape (library-linked, not stdio workspace server) so later Beskid work could diff against it when designing `beskid_lsp` and the VS Code extension. **Historical only**—superseded by workspace LSP + `beskid lsp` CLI in v0.1+.

source.subject: Add pecan_lsp workspace member with LSP architecture spec, interop migration plan, and JIT execution documentation updates
